description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior is primarily finished in gray brick and concrete, with large windows and a small fenced front yard featuring a tree and a paved walkway. The rear of the house opens to a private backyard with a patio area, green lawn, and additional paved surfaces. The house includes a garage structure on one side, seamlessly integrated into the overall design. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with some large picture windows and smaller rectangular panes. The main entryway is defined by a modest porch, a single front door, and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing functionality and simplicity.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, gray brick exterior, large windows, and a small fenced yard. Features include a garage, private backyard, and a minimalist entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the fenced yard, main entryway, and tree near the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, long brick wall, and landscaped front area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio, and large windows facing the garden.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the garage, side yard, and additional landscaping visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Single front door with a small porch, minimal steps, and a simple fence; no columns or elaborate overhangs.
